text:
First, note that time zones as we know them didn't exist in 1073, but for the purpose of this exercise, we'll use modern time zone definitions.  

Asia/Singapore is UTC+8.  
US/Eastern is UTC-5 during standard time (no DST in October).  

Time difference: UTC+8 to UTC-5 is 13 hours behind.  

7 PM (19:00) Singapore time minus 13 hours = 6:00 same day in US/Eastern.  

FINAL_ANSWER: 06:00 October 17, 1073
